notice_window: 90 days before the end of the then-current term

commercial_summary.products_or_services: DocuSign IAM platform subscription and premium support
commercial_summary.price_increase_language: Fees for any Renewal Term may increase by up to 5% over the fees charged for the immediately preceding term.
expansion_signals: The order form covers two business units and permits additional affiliates to be added by order form.

renewal_risks.extracted_language: This Agreement will renew for successive one-year Renewal Terms unless either party provides written notice of non-renewal at least ninety (90) days before the end of the then-current term.
renewal_risks.risk_reason: The agreement auto-renews unless notice is sent before the July 2, 2026 deadline.
renewal_risks.business_impact: Missing the deadline could reduce negotiation leverage and delay expansion planning.
renewal_risks.recommended_mitigation: Confirm renewal strategy with the account owner and customer sponsor before the notice deadline.

recommended_action.rationale: Auto-renewal is present and the notice window is open, so the account team should confirm renewal and expansion strategy now.
recommended_action.next_step: Log a Salesforce task due 30 days before the notice deadline and attach the extracted renewal language.
